suites.title: Verify shipping options selection based on selected shipping address country

specs.title: Verify shipping options for a supported country

steps.title: Then the selected shipping address should be displayed
And the user should be able to open available shipping options
And the user should be able to select created shipping options
And the default shipping option should remain selected

specs.title: Verify shipping options update when the shipping address country is changed

steps.title: When the user updates the shipping address country to "Canada"
Then the shipping options applicable to "Canada" should be displayed
And the previously displayed shipping options should no longer be available

specs.title: Verify only valid shipping options are shown for the selected country
